item.name: Enabled
item.description: Indicates whether the support email is enabled

item.name: On Boot
item.description: Indicates whether the a support email is sent on boot

item.name: Daily Schedule
item.description: The daily report daily schedule in CRON format.

item.name: With Issues Schedule
item.description: The regular issues report schedule in CRON format.

item.name: With Critical Issues Schedule
item.description: The critical report schedule in CRON format.

item.name: High Issues Threshold
item.description: The threshold of issues less than critical to trigger the report.

item.name: Critical Issues Threshold
item.description: The threshold of critical issues to trigger the report.

item.name: Recipient
item.description: A comma-separated list of report recipients (email addresses).

item.name: Password
item.description: The password used to encrypt the report attachment.

item.name: Password
item.description: A name of the reporting system.
